meta.editInstructions: Drop WebP files in assets/photos/ then run: node scripts/sync-photography.js. See assets/photos/README.md and PHOTOGRAPHY-SHOT-LIST.md.
meta.formats: WebP preferred. Export widths listed per slot.
meta.lcpNote: When hero is enabled, photography.js injects a preload link automatically. For fastest first paint, you may also add a matching <link rel="preload" as="image"> in index.html head.

hero.subject: Reception or theatre — real Florida Day Hospital facility only
hero.alt: Reception area at Florida Day Hospital, Florida Park, Roodepoort

pathwayAccent.subject: Wide facility interior — corridor, waiting area, or reception depth

providers.alt: Nursing and care environment at Florida Day Hospital, Roodepoort

booking.subject: Admissions / reception — phone, desk, or patient welcome area (no identifiable patients)
booking.alt: Admissions desk at Florida Day Hospital, Florida Park
